figures.label: Takeoff & Circuit
figures.tts: Take off and complete a circuit, overflying the take-off area.

figures.label: Figure of Eight
figures.tts: Fly a figure of eight course, with the cross-over point in front of the pilot. Height to be constant.

figures.label: Circuit & Landing
figures.tts: Fly a rectangular circuit and approach with appropriate use of throttle. Perform a landing on the designated landing area.

figures.label: Takeoff & Circuit
figures.tts: Take off and complete a second circuit, overflying the take-off area.

figures.label: Opposite Circuit
figures.tts: Fly a rectangular circuit at constant height, in the opposite direction to the landing circuit.

figures.label: Dead Stick Landing
figures.tts: Perform a simulated dead stick landing with engine at idle, beginning at approximately 200 feet over the take-off area. Land safely on the designated landing area.

certs.name: B Certificate
certs.reset_tts: BMFA Airplane B certificate, sequence reset.

figures.label: Figure Eight
figures.tts: Fly a figure of eight course: with the cross over point in front of pilot, height to be constant.

figures.label: Inside Loop
figures.tts: Fly into wind and complete one inside loop, managing throttle carefully on the exit of the loop.

figures.label: Outside Loop
figures.tts: Fly downwind and complete one outside loop; once again, managing the throttle carefully.

figures.label: 2x Rolls (into wind)
figures.tts: Complete two consecutive rolls into wind; with little hesitation and no serious loss of height.

figures.label: 2x Rolls (downwind)
figures.tts: Complete two consecutive rolls downwind; using the opposite direction of roll rotation; with little hesitation and no serious loss of height.

figures.label: Stall Turn
figures.tts: Complete a stall turn, either left or right, with direction of stall away from the flight line.

figures.label: 3-Turn Spin
figures.tts: Gain height, and perform a three-turn spin, with initial heading and recovery heading into wind.

figures.label: Approach & Overshoot
figures.tts: Fly a rectangular landing approach and overshoot with an abort from below 10 feet.

figures.label: Rectangular Circuit
figures.tts: Fly a rectangular circuit in the opposite direction, at a constant height of not more than 40 feet.
